interface_issues.description: Node 3 produced no high-confidence classifications, so JE Generator received an empty classified pool.
interface_issues.expected: At least some classified transactions if JE generation is to be exercised on real data.
interface_issues.impact: This run only exercises the empty-input path for JE generation.

spec_ambiguities.description: The spec does not explicitly describe what the dry-run orchestrator should report when JE Generator receives no eligible transactions because all work was routed to pending.
spec_ambiguities.spec_text: 输入：所有已分类交易（来自 Node 1/2/3 的高置信度分类结果）
spec_ambiguities.interpretation_a: JE Generator returns a clean empty result.
spec_ambiguities.interpretation_b: JE Generator should surface a workflow-level warning because downstream report generation loses direct transaction-log inputs.
spec_ambiguities.recommendation: Define the expected empty-input behavior in the JE generator dry-run contract.

notes: No real classified transactions were available, so JE generation was not exercised on transaction data in this run.
